note: One granular representative per asset class; matches the 11-symbol champion (0.932 vs 0.935) with 6 instruments. target_vol 0.20 is the deployability knob (Sharpe is cost-adjusted-invariant to it); min-viable equity $9.4k, funded to $12k for buffer so the UST10Y leg (volume_min=1.0) cannot round to zero on a drawdown. speeds='slow' is the pre-registered set; 'fast' is post-hoc (PBO 0.54) and NOT promoted.
